heading: Accession of state trading regimes to General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade or WTO
label: 2905 Accession of state trading regimes to General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade or WTO

children.label: A
children.text: the exports of such major foreign country, or

children.label: B
children.text: the goods of such major foreign country that are subject to competition from goods imported into such foreign country; and

children.label: A
children.text: unduly burden and restrict, or adversely affect, the foreign trade of the United States or the United States economy, or

children.label: B
children.text: are likely to result in such a burden, restriction, or effect.

the President shall reserve the right of the United States to withhold extension of the application of the GATT 1947 or the WTO Agreement, between the United States and such major foreign country, and

children.label: I
children.text: make purchases which are not for the use of such foreign country, and

children.label: ii
children.text: will afford United States business firms adequate opportunity, in accordance with customary practice, to compete for participation in such purchases or sales; or

children.label: B
children.text: a bill submitted under subsection (c) which approves of the extension of the application of the GATT 1947 or the WTO Agreement between the United States and such major foreign country is enacted into law.

children.heading: Expedited consideration of bill to approve extension
children.label: c Expedited consideration of bill to approve extension

children.text: The President may submit to the Congress any draft of a bill which approves of the extension of the application of the GATT 1947 or the WTO Agreement between the United States and a major foreign country.

children.label: A
children.text: be introduced by the majority leader of each House of the Congress (by request) on the first day on which such House is in session after the date such draft is submitted to the Congress; and

children.label: B
children.text: shall be treated as an implementing bill for purposes of subsections (d), (e), (f), and (g) of .section 2191 of this title

children.heading: Publication
children.label: d Publication
children.text: The President shall publish in the Federal Register each determination made under subsection (a).
The term “GATT 1947” has the meaning given that term in .section 3501(1)(A) of this title

The term “WTO Agreement” means the Agreement Establishing the World Trade Organization entered into on and the multilateral trade agreements (as such term is defined in ).April 15, 1994section 3501(4) of this title
